query:
-- Verificar leads pendentes de distribuição
SELECT 
  status,
  CASE WHEN corretorId IS NULL THEN 'sem_corretor' ELSE 'com_corretor' END as tem_corretor,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM leads
WHERE status IN ('novo', 'aguardando_atendimento')
GROUP BY status, tem_corretor
ORDER BY total DESC;
